## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refresh batches 2-5 nearly complete; 4 new articles published this week](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Flex product launch delayed to Sept 24; content publication timeline adjusted accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [SEO performance shows mixed results, but overall positive trends in impressions and estimated traffic](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [New testing framework being developed for SEO, GEO, and CRO experiments across clients](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [4 net new articles published this week from Tanmay's list](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Calibration article for Flex ready to go](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [38+ articles in backlog, plus 8 from previous list](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Content publication for Flex pushed back to Sept 24 to align with product launch](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [4-week content plan developed, focusing on sovereignty concepts, competitive differentiation, regulatory compliance, and technical implementation](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Plan to publish \~10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Mixed results from refresh batches, but overall positive trends](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Estimated traffic up 14-15% from beginning to end of August (SEMrush data)](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Impressions in Google Search Console showing growth, especially in last two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Team not relying solely on SEMrush data; focusing on Google Search Console impressions and citation growth](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Recent algorithm changes and seasonality may be impacting results](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### Testing Framework Development

  - [Jakub developing centralized testing framework for SEO, GEO, and CRO experiments](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Aim to pair energies and learnings across clients, with Airbyte at the forefront](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Planning to finalize dashboard and pick experiments to run with Airbyte next week](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Seeking input on test ideas from team members](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Website Migration and Product Launch

  - [New website launch slightly delayed, impacting Flex product launch (4 working days difference)](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Content publication can proceed as normal during migration](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Team to update content with new design elements once website launches](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### Content Gap Analysis

  - [Tanmay conducted analysis comparing Airbyte to Hivo Data](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Identified topics where Airbyte lacks content; added to August articles tab](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Plan to conduct similar analysis for S2R next month](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Focus on industries and use case pages once new website launches](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

  - [Carrie to brief Joe on content production plans for next week during her absence](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on content ideas shared in dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/64VZ9fGuv6XTGNWaFApAnwmNeVfL4v2F?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
